{"author":{"id":"MDQ6VXNlcjUwODI0MzU0","is_bot":false,"login":"hirokikondo86","name":"Hiroki Kondo"},"body":"## 関連

- Backlog
  - [[ecnavi-batch] EventBridge 失敗通知設定](https://ecnstaff.backlog.jp/view/SKT_4-362)
- CDK 修正
  - https://github.com/voyagegroup/ecnavi-batch/pull/1550

## 既存の調査

既存では crontab の標準のメール送信機能で失敗通知を行っている。

- [crontab の設定](https://github.com/voyagegroup/krono/blob/a75e373c52653ad7f09e2642d5921ff37fe117d3/lib/krono/templates/crontab.erb#L2)
- [MAILTO の設定 (`ecnavi_error`)](https://github.com/voyagegroup/krono/blob/a75e373c52653ad7f09e2642d5921ff37fe117d3/config/specs/ecnavisb-2g-batch-01/app-ecnavi.yaml#L3)
- [エイリアス (`ecnavi_error`) の設定](https://github.com/voyagegroup/ecnavi-provisioning/blob/f9c7a40e08c297ac7b027e84efdfb3794572e84a/hosts/ecnavi-sandbox/vars/all.yml#L13-L14)

## 新規構築

以下の流れで Slack に失敗通知を行う。

1. **EventBridge**
   - StepFunctionsのトリガーイベントを管理。
2. **DLQ（Dead Letter Queue）**
   - StepFunctions の発火が失敗した場合にエラーを格納。
   - [EventBridge の機能として、配信失敗時に DLQ (EventBridge が使用する標準の Amazon SQSキュー) に失敗したイベントを保存できる。](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/ja_jp/eventbridge/latest/userguide/eb-rule-dlq.html)
3. **CloudWatchAlarm**
    - DLQ にメッセージが入ったことを検知
    - 入ったタイミングで SNS に通知
4. **SNS（Simple Notification Service）**
   - DLQ からエラー通知を受け取り、通知メッセージを配信。
5. **ChatBot**
   - SNS の通知メッセージを受け取り、Slack に通知。
6. **Slack**
   - [#ecnavi_dev](https://cartaholdings.slack.com/archives/C04CZEPT2)

## やること

1. **SQS の作成**
   - EventBridge が使用する DLQ を作成。
3. **EventBridge の DLQ に (1) の DLQ を設定**
   - CDK を修正。
   - https://github.com/voyagegroup/ecnavi-batch/pull/1550
4. **SNS Topic の作成**
5. **ChatBot**
   - 通知したい Slack チャンネルの設定。
   - (3) で作成した SNS トピックをサブスクライブ (SNS 側でも自動で紐付く)
6. **CloudWatchAlarm の設定**

参考 : [例: SQS、CloudWatch、SNS](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/ja_jp/elasticbeanstalk/latest/dg/customize-environment-resources-sqs.html)

## ChangeSet

- [x] [ap-northeast-1.ecnavi-sandbox:ecnavi-sandbox01-SQS-Queue](https://ap-northeast-1.console.aws.amazon.com/cloudformation/home?region=ap-northeast-1#/stacks/changesets?stackId=arn:aws:cloudformation:ap-northeast-1:698074568921:stack/ecnavi-sandbox01-SQS-Queue/3c59dcc0-39dc-11e7-ac54-503a369c8836) 
- [x] [ap-northeast-1.ecnavi-sandbox:ecnavi-sandbox01-SNS-Topic](https://ap-northeast-1.console.aws.amazon.com/cloudformation/home?region=ap-northeast-1#/stacks/changesets?stackId=arn:aws:cloudformation:ap-northeast-1:698074568921:stack/ecnavi-sandbox01-SNS-Topic/3adb5310-39dc-11e7-8bac-50a68a175ae6) 
- [x] [ap-northeast-1.ecnavi-sandbox:ecnavi-sandbox01-Chatbot-SlackChannelConfiguration](https://ap-northeast-1.console.aws.amazon.com/cloudformation/home?region=ap-northeast-1#/stacks/changesets?stackId=arn:aws:cloudformation:ap-northeast-1:698074568921:stack/ecnavi-sandbox01-Chatbot-SlackChannelConfiguration/b8941b40-9226-11ed-b73c-06071be90e4d) 
- [x] [ap-northeast-1.ecnavi-sandbox:ecnavi-sandbox01-Logs-Alarm](https://ap-northeast-1.console.aws.amazon.com/cloudformation/home?region=ap-northeast-1#/stacks/changesets?stackId=arn:aws:cloudformation:ap-northeast-1:698074568921:stack/ecnavi-sandbox01-Logs-Alarm/a534c450-8081-11ef-934d-0e83bd6e342d)

content.text:
はい、PR #4389を読み込めました。内容を確認しました。

これは「EventBridge 失敗通知設定」のPRで、既存のcrontabメール通知からSlack通知への移行を行っています。EventBridge → DLQ → CloudWatchAlarm → SNS → ChatBot → Slackの流れで失敗通知を実装しており、サンドボックス環境用の設定のようです。

このPRについて何か具体的に確認したいことはありますか？

@@ -0,0 +1,50 @@
+---
+AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
+Description: ""
+Parameters:
+  StackBaseName:
+    Type: String
+    Default: "ecnavi-sandbox01"
+    Description: "BaseName for this stack."
+Resources:
+  LogsAlarmEcnaviBatchErrorLog:
+    Type: "AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm"
+    Properties:
+      ActionsEnabled: true
+      AlarmActions:
+        - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicEcnaviBatchErrorArn"
+      AlarmDescription: "Alarm if ecnavi-batch EventBridge DLQ message sent is greater than 0."
+      AlarmName: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-EcnaviBatchEventBridgeDLQAlarm"
+      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
+      EvaluationPeriods: 1
+      Metrics:
+        - Id: m1
+          MetricStat:
+            Metric:
+              Dimensions:
+                - Name: QueueName
+                  Value:
+                    "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SQSQueueEcnaviBatchEventBridgeDLQName"
+              MetricName: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible
+              Namespace: AWS/SQS
+            Period: 60
+            Stat: Sum
+          ReturnData: false
+        - Id: m2
+          MetricStat:
+            Metric:
+              Dimensions:
+                - Name: QueueName
+                  Value:
+                    "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SQSQueueEcnaviBatchEventBridgeDLQName"
+              MetricName: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesNotVisible
+              Namespace: AWS/SQS
+            Period: 60
+            Stat: Sum
+          ReturnData: false
+        - Id: e1
+          Expression: RATE(m1+m2)
+          Label: MessageSentRate
+          ReturnData: true
+      Threshold: 0
+      TreatMissingData: breaching

file.content:
---
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Parameters:
  StackBaseName:
    Type: "String"
    Default: "voyagemarketing-sandbox01"
    Description: "BaseName for this stack."
Resources:
  SQSQueueDigicoAppEmailDeliveryFeature:
    Type: "AWS::SQS::Queue"
    Properties:
      DelaySeconds: 0
      MaximumMessageSize: 262144
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600
      QueueName: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-digico-app-email-delivery-feature"
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 20 # long polling
      VisibilityTimeout: 180 # lambda timeout の6倍
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-digico-app-email-delivery-feature"
        - Key: "ResourceGroup"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}"
  SQSQueuePexBatchEventBridgeDlq:
    Type: "AWS::SQS::Queue"
    Properties:
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600 # 14days (max)
      QueueName: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-pex-batch-event-bridge-dlq"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-pex-batch-event-bridge-dlq"
        - Key: "ResourceGroup"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}"
Outputs:
  SQSQueueDigicoAppEmailDeliveryFeatureArn:
    Value: !GetAtt SQSQueueDigicoAppEmailDeliveryFeature.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SQSQueueDigicoAppEmailDeliveryFeatureArn"
  SQSQueueDigicoAppEmailDeliveryFeatureUrl:
    Value: !Ref SQSQueueDigicoAppEmailDeliveryFeature
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SQSQueueDigicoAppEmailDeliveryFeatureUrl"

---
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Parameters:
  StackBaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: "voyagemarketing-sandbox01"
    Description: "BaseName for this stack."
  CommonStackBaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: "voyagemarketing-sandbox-common"
    Description: "BaseName for common stack."
Resources:
  SNSTopicCodepipelineApproval:
    Type: "AWS::SNS::Topic"
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-codepipeline-approval"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-codepipeline-approval"
        - Key: "ResourceGroup"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}"
  LambdaPermissionCodepipelineApproval:
    Type: "AWS::Lambda::Permission"
    Properties:
      FunctionName:
        Fn::ImportValue: !Sub "${CommonStackBaseName}-LambdaFunctionNotifyCodepipelineApprovalFunctionName"
      Action: "lambda:InvokeFunction"
      Principal: "sns.amazonaws.com"
      SourceArn: !Ref SNSTopicCodepipelineApproval
  SNSTopicCodedeployResult:
    Type: "AWS::SNS::Topic"
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-codedeploy-result"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-codedeploy-result"
        - Key: "ResourceGroup"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}"
  LambdaPermissionCodedeployResult:
    Type: "AWS::Lambda::Permission"
    Properties:
      FunctionName:
        Fn::ImportValue: !Sub "${CommonStackBaseName}-LambdaFunctionNotifyCodedeployResultFunctionName"
      Action: "lambda:InvokeFunction"
      Principal: "sns.amazonaws.com"
      SourceArn: !Ref SNSTopicCodedeployResult
  SNSTopicSESComplaints:
    Type: "AWS::SNS::Topic"
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-ses-complaints"
      DisplayName: "SES complaint notifications"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-ses-complaints"
        - Key: "ResourceGroup"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}"
  SNSTopicSESBounces:
    Type: "AWS::SNS::Topic"
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-ses-bounces"
      DisplayName: "SES bounce notifications"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-ses-bounces"
        - Key: "ResourceGroup"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}"
  SNSTopicSESDeliveries:
    Type: "AWS::SNS::Topic"
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-ses-deliveries"
      DisplayName: "SES Delivery notifications"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-ses-deliveries"
        - Key: "ResourceGroup"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}"
  SNSTopicSESDigicoAppEmailDeliveryFeature:
    Type: "AWS::SNS::Topic"
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-ses-digico-app-email-delivery-feature"
      DisplayName: "SES for digico app mail delivery feature"
      DeliveryStatusLogging:
        - Protocol: "sqs"
          SuccessFeedbackRoleArn:
            "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${CommonStackBaseName}-IAMRoleSNSFeedbackArn"
          SuccessFeedbackSampleRate: 0
          FailureFeedbackRoleArn:
            "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${CommonStackBaseName}-IAMRoleSNSFeedbackArn"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-ses-digico-app-email-delivery-feature"
        - Key: "ResourceGroup"
          Value: !Sub "${StackBaseName}"
Outputs:
  SNSTopicCodepipelineApprovalArn:
    Value: !Ref SNSTopicCodepipelineApproval
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicCodepipelineApprovalArn"
  SNSTopicCodedeployResultArn:
    Value: !Ref SNSTopicCodedeployResult
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicCodedeployResultArn"
  SNSTopicSESComplaintsArn:
    Value: !Ref "SNSTopicSESComplaints"
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicSESComplaintsArn"
  SNSTopicSESBouncesArn:
    Value: !Ref "SNSTopicSESBounces"
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicSESBouncesArn"
  SNSTopicSESDeliveriesArn:
    Value: !Ref "SNSTopicSESDeliveries"
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicSESDeliveriesArn"
  SNSTopicSESDigicoAppEmailDeliveryFeatureArn:
    Value: !Ref "SNSTopicSESDigicoAppEmailDeliveryFeature"
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicSESDigicoAppEmailDeliveryFeatureArn"

---
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: ""
Parameters:
  StackBaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: "voyagemarketing-sandbox01"
    Description: "BaseName for this stack."
Resources:
  LogsAlarmVoyagemarketingBatchErrorLog:
    Type: "AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm"
    Properties:
      ActionsEnabled: true
      AlarmActions:
        - "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SNSTopicVoyagemarketingBatchErrorArn"
      AlarmDescription: "Alarm if voyagemarketing-batch EventBridge DLQ message sent is greater than 0."
      AlarmName: !Sub "${StackBaseName}-VoyagemarketingBatchEventBridgeDLQAlarm"
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Metrics:
        - Id: m1
          MetricStat:
            Metric:
              Dimensions:
                - Name: QueueName
                  Value:
                    "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SQSQueueVoyagemarketingBatchEventBridgeDLQName"
              MetricName: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible
              Namespace: AWS/SQS
            Period: 60
            Stat: Sum
          ReturnData: false
        - Id: m2
          MetricStat:
            Metric:
              Dimensions:
                - Name: QueueName
                  Value:
                    "Fn::ImportValue": !Sub "${StackBaseName}-SQSQueueVoyagemarketingBatchEventBridgeDLQName"
              MetricName: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesNotVisible
              Namespace: AWS/SQS
            Period: 60
            Stat: Sum
          ReturnData: false
        - Id: e1
          Expression: RATE(m1+m2)
          Label: MessageSentRate
          ReturnData: true
      Threshold: 0
      TreatMissingData: breaching

content.text:
PR #4389を参考に、voyagemarketing-sandbox01に同様のEventBridge失敗通知設定を追加しました。

**変更内容：**

1. **SQS Queue設定** (`SQS-Queue.yml`):
   - `SQSQueueVoyagemarketingBatchEventBridgeDLQ` リソースを追加
   - 対応するOutputsを追加

2. **SNS Topic設定** (`SNS-Topic.yml`):
   - `SNSTopicVoyagemarketingBatchError` リソースを追加
   - 対応するOutputを追加

3. **ChatBot設定** (`common/Chatbot-SlackChannelConfiguration.yml`):
   - 既存の `SlackChannelPexAlertDevelopment` にSNSトピックを追加
   - 新しい `SlackChannelVoyagemarketingBatchAlert` を追加

4. **CloudWatch Alarm設定** (`Logs-Alarm.yml`):
   - DLQのメッセージ数を監視するアラームを新規作成

5. **マッピング設定** (`mapping-vm-sandbox.yml`):
   - `Logs-Alarm.yml` エントリを追加

これで、voyagemarketing-sandbox01環境でEventBridge失敗時にSlackに通知される仕組みが構築されます。
